mnemonics.title: Visualization Tools
mnemonics.content: TAG DPQ-KG: Tableau, Apache Superset, Grafana, D3.js, Power BI, QlikView, Kepler.gl

acronyms.usage: Used in tools like Plotly for declarative visualization specs

visualTips.visualization: Imagine waterfall flowing into dashboard with live counters

analogies.analogy: Like a mural painting team where each artist works on different wall sections simultaneously
